turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I am also facing the real possibility of surgery which scares the heck out of me. I am! I have a severe auto immune disease called Ulcerative Colitis, and I am on immuno suppresant meds on top of that

results.term: Well  kind of yes. I am going crazy because I've h...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Well  kind of yes. I am going crazy because I've had this for 8 years now and it's forever changing. I've been hospitalized so many times its crazy. This pandemic has made things worse because stress makes it all worse

results.term: Its just really depressing not knowing what to exp...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Its just really depressing not knowing what to expect next. Its hard to trust the good days sometimes because you can have a wonderful day and wake up really sick the next. Its very unpredictable and I think whats worse is that people really don't understand.

results.term: Yes I am part of many on facebook, and yes it does...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes I am part of many on facebook, and yes it does help a lot. I just wish my husband would be able to understand. He says and does some things that make me feel even worse. Almost like he thinks I'm making it up at times. Like, dear goodness no.

results.term: I have tried to talk to him but he seems very unin...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have tried to talk to him but he seems very uninterested at times. I even tried going to counseling with him and that didn't work. It's just frustrating. He was with me when the one doctor had said just how bad it was and he didn't seem to really pay attention. He was also there when I had to have an emergancy blood transfusion and it was really hard to read him. He just doesnt say or so much

results.term: Yeah whenever I try it's like pulling teeth. I kno...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yeah whenever I try it's like pulling teeth. I know some of it is how he was brought up. I don't think his dad ever showed much emotion/

turn_info.content: so yes I'm sure that has something to do with it. I also feel bad a lot of the time because I have two kids. I feel like I fail them a lot
